title: Fix 'Unauthorized — admin only' error for authenticated admin users

requirements.summary: Surface clear, human-readable error messages in Admin Panel pages when backend mutations return authorization errors, so admins know immediately if they need to re-authenticate rather than seeing raw error strings.
acceptanceCriteria: When any admin mutation fails with an authorization-related error, a visible toast or error banner is shown with text like 'Action failed: you must be logged in as an Admin. Please re-authenticate and try again.'
The error state is cleared when the user retries or navigates away.
Successful mutations show a success confirmation as before.

file_operations.description: Add error handling to the addFeeType mutation that detects authorization-related errors (e.g., error messages containing 'Unauthorized' or 'admin only') and displays a clear, human-readable toast notification prompting the admin to re-authenticate. Ensure successful fee creation still shows a success toast and the error state is cleared on retry or navigation.

Add error handling to the addCourse mutation that detects authorization-related errors and displays a clear toast notification with text like 'Action failed: you must be logged in as an Admin. Please re-authenticate and try again.' Ensure successful course creation still shows a success toast and the error state is cleared appropriately.

Add error handling to the addStudentProfile mutation that detects authorization-related errors and displays a human-readable toast notification. Ensure the error is cleared when the user retries or navigates away, and successful student registration still shows a success confirmation.

Add error handling to the addResult mutation that detects authorization-related errors and displays a clear toast notification prompting re-authentication. Ensure successful result posting still shows a success toast and the error state is cleared on retry or navigation.

Add error handling to the sendAnnouncement mutation that detects authorization-related errors and displays a human-readable toast notification. Ensure successful announcements still show a success confirmation and the error state is cleared appropriately.

Add error handling to the updateHostelApplicationStatus mutation that detects authorization-related errors and displays a clear toast notification with re-authentication guidance. Ensure successful hostel approvals/rejections still show success confirmations and the error state is cleared on retry or navigation.

Add error handling to the updateAdmissionStatus mutation that detects authorization-related errors and displays a human-readable toast notification. Ensure successful admission status updates still show success confirmations and the error state is cleared appropriately.
